title: edhoc.py: imports inside functions (hmac, io) called multiple times
description:
src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py has imports inside functions:
- Line 87: 'import hmac' inside _hkdf_extract()
- Line 181: 'import io' inside _decode_cbor_sequence()

These functions are called multiple times per EDHOC session. Move imports to module level.
